title: Fix Zephyr audit firmware defects
description: Resolve every software, configuration, startup, link, and memory-corruption defect discovered by the exhaustive Zephyr firmware boot audit. Child work must preserve runtime oracles and rerun affected target rows.
acceptance_criteria: All audit-discovered executable firmware FAIL rows either pass their original independent runtime oracle or have a narrower confirmed external dependency; app_identity and ping_l2 pass with stack protection enabled; no test or security oracle is weakened.
